AR1.justification: The entry belongs in observations.md and that is where the content landed, with no explicit routing rationale recorded.

AR3.justification: The write destroyed the file's existing relative reference to methodology.md#provenance-markers along with the rest of the scaffold, leaving the entry with no path back to the convention it should cite.

AR4.justification: observations.md was overwritten rather than appended to — the header, template, shape guidance, and prior anchors were deleted, so re-running would compound the corruption of an append-only register.
